findings.one_line: This proves only that, after fixing the extension class H_*(P,M) and the evaluation point tau_*(P), point evaluation ranges over [L_*(P,M), U_*(P,M)]; the cost-quality selection structure is not doing real mathematical work, so the delivered content is essentially a fixed-target attainment lemma rather than a field-level selected-cutoff identification theorem.

Despite the node name, the discharged statement gives only continuity, convexity/concavity, monotonicity, and endpoint contact of the M-indexed bounds; the genuinely informative finite active-set or spline-switching geometry remains open.

The post-selection honest-CI result is conditional on three high-level gates—selected-threshold localization, generated-score expansion, and selected-neighborhood oracle coverage—that are exactly the hard new ingredients, so no actual feasible selected-cutoff coverage theorem is delivered.
